song.title: Jesus Lord
song.lyrics: [V1] .A E A7 D Jesus Lord, Jesus Lord, .A F#m Bm E How we long to touch Thee. .A E A7 D More and more, more and more, .A E7 A That You may grow within us.|| .E E7 A A7 Blossom of gold may You bloom and grow, .D B7 E E7 Bloom and grow forever. . A A7 D Dm Then all will see, all will know, .A E A You are the Lord within us.
